raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"person","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"I'm having some trouble establishing a consistent wake-up routine.","distilled_fact":"The user is having some trouble establishing a consistent wake-up routine."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"event","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"I was doing pretty well for a bit, but then I had a big project at work that threw everything off.","distilled_fact":"The user had a big project at work that threw off the user's wake-up routine."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"person","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"I've been trying to get back on track, but it's been tough.","distilled_fact":"The user has been trying to get back on track."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"habit","confidence":0.98,"matched_text":"I recently started taking a morning yoga class on Tuesdays and Thursdays","distilled_fact":"The user recently started taking a morning yoga class on Tuesdays and Thursdays."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"schedule","confidence":0.98,"matched_text":"which has forced me to wake up at 6:45 AM on those days","distilled_fact":"The user's morning yoga class on Tuesdays and Thursdays has forced the user to wake up at 6:45 AM on Tuesdays and Thursdays."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"experience","confidence":0.97,"matched_text":"it's actually been really helpful.","distilled_fact":"The user's morning yoga class on Tuesdays and Thursdays has been really helpful."}]}
